error_signature: HTTP Request node times out after 5 minutes
title: HTTP Request node timeout issue with Apify tasks
symptom: When triggering an Apify task that takes longer than 5 minutes, the HTTP Request node times out and fails without returning a response.
applies_when: Using HTTP Request node to call Apify tasks
Apify tasks take longer than 5 minutes to complete
not_this_if: Using a different method to trigger Apify tasks
root_cause: The default timeout for HTTP requests in n8n is set to 5 minutes. When an external API call exceeds this duration, the request times out, resulting in no response and failure to capture necessary identifiers like runId.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Add a timeout option and set it to 600000 (10 minutes)
Test the workflow again with a long-running Apify task
agent_instruction: Increase the timeout in the HTTP Request node to 10 minutes to handle longer Apify tasks.
